evidence: npm run build && npm run check && npm test all exit 0 (full monorepo, multiple runs across 3 commits). Real pi-context CLI runtime demos: top-level compliant/forbidden-pattern write (issues block), nested-array writer over-cap/compliant (layer-plans.layers[]), and whole-item inline-nested-content over-cap/compliant (layer-plans plan created with layers[] populated inline) all confirmed refusal/success as expected. Two independent fresh adversarial re-audits found real defects (nested-writer wrong-subschema resolution; enforcement not descending into inline nested content), each fixed via full explore-plan-agent cycles (commits dc4f757c, 41376b0a) and re-audited to zero findings. docs-surface-sync audit found the README paragraph stale after both fixes; corrected (commit f0c4f80f). Follow-on out-of-scope class (budgeted primitive-string arrays) filed as FGAP-139 after explore-before-file prior-art search confirmed no duplicate.
